name: Secret Courtyard Resort Hotel
address: No.32 Taohua Road,Lujiacun Village, Reed Flute Cave, Quế Lâm, Trung Quốc
description:
Positioned along Taohua River, Secret Courtyard Resort Hotel boasts a Chinese-style courtyard and is located in Lujia Village, just 2 km from downtown Guilin. Surrounded by mountains and waters, the property offers quiet accommodation and peaceful ambience where you may easily relax.

Reed Flute Cave lays 5 minutes' drive away. It takes 15 minutes by car to Li River, Taohua River, and Two Rivers and Four Lakes, and 15 minutes by car to downtown Guilin. Guilin Railway Station can be reached in 20 minutes' car ride. It is a 40-minute drive to Liangjiang International Airport. Xianggong Mountain is 50 km away. Yangshuo West Street and Yulong River are 60 kilometers.

Featuring mountain or river views, all air-conditioned rooms are fitted with an LCD TV, quality bed linen and wood furniture. Soundproofing rooms here will also offer a balcony or bay windows. In the private bathroom, you may find a hairdryer, slippers, a shaver and branded free toiletries.

A wide range of convenience facilities or service are offered, including English travel assistance service, beauty spa centre, a bar with music and a book bar. You may rent a bike to explore the area, or the staff can help design personalised travel routes. Free parking is available.

The restaurant with floor-to-ceiling windows offers local specialties while the lobby bar serves free tea.

demographics.name: Gia đình có thanh thiếu niên

sample_comments.text: Vị trí tuyệt vời được bao quanh bởi cảnh đẹp, gần trung tâm thành phố với giao thông thuận tiện. Tiểu Minh rất thân thiện và hữu ích, và tài xế Eric cung cấp những chuyến đi đáng tin cậy. Căn phòng sạch sẽ, thoải mái và được bảo trì tốt. Bữa sáng ngon miệng với nhiều sự lựa chọn. Tổng thể, một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ và dễ chịu. Chắc chắn sẽ đặt lại lần nữa!
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.room_type: Phòng Đôi Loại Sang

sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Great service and very good location!

sample_comments.text: Bạn có thể hỏi muốn đi đâu để tham quan hoặc nhờ tìm taxi. Phía sau khách sạn có động Reed Cave Flute nhưng hơi xa một chút. Hãy đi theo con đường màu đỏ cho đến khi đến đó.
sample_comments.title: Người sở hữu khách sạn thân thiện
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

sample_comments.title: Wonderful place away from the hustle of the city
sample_comments.positives: The villa is located in a secluded area, far from the hustle of the city, but still easy to reach by Didi or scooter, which are offered to guest to be used for free during the stay. Xiaming, the owner of the place, is a very nice person, very helpful and kind. He carried both our really heavy bags up the stairs to our room on the 2nd floor. He gave us complimentary bottles of water, mandarines and napkins everytime we left the villa for a tour and when we did the checkout. The breakfast was also nice, being able to choose between Asia and European version. The room was nice and cosy. Though there is no central heating in the room, the air conditioning and the electric heated top mattress were more than enough.
sample_comments.negatives: N/A

sample_comments.text: Khách sạn nằm ở ngoại ô thành phố, xung quanh là thiên nhiên tươi đẹp, một con đường sinh thái và một con sông. Mặc dù cách trung tâm thành phố 5km, nơi đây mang lại sự yên tĩnh và bình lặng. Chúng tôi đặc biệt đánh giá cao người phục vụ, người luôn hết lòng cung cấp sự hỗ trợ. Những cử chỉ dễ thương của họ khi cung cấp cho chúng tôi một số món ăn nhẹ, cam và một chai nước trước khi tham gia tour và trước khi chúng tôi rời khỏi Quế Lâm thật không nơi nào có được.
sample_comments.title: Một ngôi nhà nghỉ nhỏ xinh xắn
sample_comments.room_type: Phòng Đôi Loại Sang

sample_comments.title: This is my second time and if I come back to Guilin I'll come back again to the same place.
sample_comments.positives: The room was well prepared before our arrival. It was cold and the room and prepared to keep us warm even before our arrival. Beds had heating pads and their room for families with kids was amazing. Enough toys and things to keep a 4 year old busy throughout. Comfortable bunk bed with double bed on the lower deck and single on the upper deck. On the whole nothing to complain.
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing

sample_comments.text: Chủ khách sạn rất thân thiện và sẵn sàng giúp tìm phương tiện di chuyển đến các địa điểm du lịch, ga và sân bay. Vì vậy, dễ dàng đi lại.
sample_comments.title: Chủ khách sạn rất thân thiện.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: the location of thr hotel is in a quiet village, perfect if you want to enjoy nature and a peaceful time in Guilin. The rooms are great, the staff helped us with absolutely everything, breakfast was tasty and you can even use their motorbikes for free... we came back again and will do it next year!

sample_comments.text:
Chúng tôi đến nơi vào đêm khuya, và nếu bạn sử dụng Google Maps, bạn sẽ bị lạc ngay từ đầu. Vì vậy, hãy sử dụng Didi. Một số tài xế ở ga Guilinxi đã nói với chúng tôi rằng không có Didi, vì vậy chúng tôi đã phải đi taxi và cuối cùng bị thả không đúng địa điểm. 

Xioming đã chờ sẵn ở quán cà phê khi chúng tôi tìm thấy nơi này. Và chúng tôi được dẫn đến phòng ngay sau khi anh ấy phục vụ cho chúng tôi một ly nước trái cây ngon. Dịch vụ rất tốt. Bữa sáng là một bữa ăn set với trái cây và sữa chua, có lựa chọn Âu hoặc Trung. Nước đóng chai do chủ nhà cung cấp thì rất nhiều.

Cảnh đẹp vào buổi sáng thật tuyệt vời, bạn có thể ngắm nhìn những ngọn đồi Guilin. Có một con đường chạy bộ và đi bộ đến Hang sậy. Chủ nhà đã tặng chúng tôi cam như một món quà chia tay. 

Nếu tôi có cơ hội quay lại Guilin, tôi rất muốn ở lại đây lần nữa. P.S. Có một vài nhà hàng ở gần đó.

sample_comments.title: Great Stay
sample_comments.text:
A Hidden Gem in Guilin - Worth Booking Again!
We had a lovely stay at this charming hotel in the Guilin area. True to the reservation details, we were warmly welcomed with a complimentary pick-up from the railway station and a free massage for one night --- a thoughtful touch that set the tone for a relaxing visit.
 Highlights
- Comfortable Rooms with Balcony: The room we received was spacious and came with a balcony --- a delightful bonus if you're lucky enough to get one!
- Tasty Breakfast Spread: Each morning offered a satisfying mix of options including toast, rice noodles, fresh fruits, yogurt, eggs, and drinks. A great way to start the day.
- Exceptional Host: The host went above and beyond to help us plan our sightseeing, offering local insights and arranging visits to must-see spots.
 Things to Note
- Some rooms could use a bit more attention to cleanliness --- a light layer of dust was noticeable.
- There are no cupboards or lockers, which might be inconvenient for storing valuables.
- No fridge in the room, so keep that in mind if you need cold storage.
 Final Thoughts
Despite a few minor drawbacks, the overall experience was wonderful. The hospitality, location, and comfort made it a memorable stay. I'd definitely choose this hotel again --- especially for the warm service and the lovely room I had last time.
sample_comments.room_type: Double Room with Massage - free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

sample_comments.title: A peaceful village experience
sample_comments.text: My family and I enjoyed a long weekend in Guilin, and the Secret Courtyard was a great home base to experience the sights of the area.. The villa is spacious and cozy with four bedrooms and separate baths, which is great when traveling with teens. The village is small and isolated from the hustle of the city. Walking around the lake in evening was peaceful. We had three days exploring the sights then returning to the villa un evening to enjoy dinner at local restaurants. (And beers on patio). Our host was exceptionally friendly and helpful to arrange tours, with Xianggong Mountain being a must see. I was a little concerned initially with the remoteness of this village but it was very safe and quiet, that I slept so well. The furnishings were traditional Chinese and thus a bit uncomfortable if you want enjoy lounging around watching TV. I'd highly recommend this place for couples or families with older children keen to see the sights. Kudos to our great host for a warm stay

sample_comments.title: Best stay in our China trip
sample_comments.text:
At the beginning when were getting to the place by taxi I was worried it could be a bit far from the center... but it turned out to be perfect. As soon as we arrived the owner offered us tea and even some delicious slices of watermelon while doing the check in . We arrived a bit early so he pointed us to a nearby restaurant which was very good and also beautiful had a classic Chinese garden. The room was very really nice, with big windows, where you can see the surrounding mountains. Great views to wake up to. It's also very quiet at night so you can get a nice sleep. Breakfast is included. It's a simple but delicious "western" breakfast, including fresh fruits, toast, eggs and yogurt. And also coffee!! Not that I don't like Chinese breakfast, but I really enjoyed this breakfast after eating noodles for breakfast for 2 weeks straight in my trip in China. The owner was very attentive the whole time, always offering some snacks, water, even packed our breakfast for an early trip we had to Yangshuo. Regarding the hotel being a bit far from the city center, my homie also has you covered, you can use their electric motorbikes for free! Best thing ever to drive around and explore the city like a reckless local driver. 
 (Chinese are pretty chilled drivers, so don't worry). So if you are thinking about booking this place, just hit that book button and enjoy your stay.

The hotel offered picked up from the train station and it was a great help! Take the offer if you stay more than two nights since the train station could be a mess. 
I was sick arriving at the hotel, the hotel owner Xiao Ming was very kind and attentive to offer me drink and Chinese herbal medication.
sample_comments.negatives:
The breakfast could be better with more choices.
The location was remote in a village and you might feel lack of things to do.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: 帥氣、熱情的老板，用心經營，房間整潔乾淨舒服，住2晚就可以安排從高鐵站接送到酒店，非常方便！司機的態度很好
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

sample_comments.title: Perfectly nice place to spend a couple nights in Guilin
sample_comments.positives: Charming and homey little place with a friendly and helpful on-site manager. The Chinese noodle breakfast was very good. The outdoor clawfoot bathtub was cool.
sample_comments.negatives: The outside bathtub was quite dirty at check-in, washed myself to use. The view from the bed was not what I expected from the pictures (no direct view).

sample_comments.title: 5星推薦！！
sample_comments.text: 剛來第一天老闆會給水果和又可以提早入住和延遲退房 老闆人很好而且回覆迅速 居住環境好 有山景 附近又有餐廳 又有免費早餐 老闆還會親自下廚 十分推薦來
sample_comments.room_type: Double Room with Massage - free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

sample_comments.title: Fabulous stay for the money, staff nice, wifi worked great. Overall a great stay
sample_comments.positives: Loved the balcony and the beds were amazing! Also liked the staff. Very kind and friendly. Safe place to stay.
sample_comments.negatives: The air conditioning wasn't very strong or wasn't working properly. Hot in the room

sample_comments.title: 不讲信用的民宿
sample_comments.text: 我们到达后，前台服务人员要我们等五分钟，然后住店。在去房间的路上，他跟我们说我们被安排在了又大又新的房子。到达后，他就离开了。等我们抬头一看，才发现这是另外一家民宿。这家民宿接待人员跟我们说：我们订的民宿没有房间了，就把我们转到他这里了。这是公开的欺骗行为。
sample_comments.room_type: Fully View Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

sample_comments.title: 非常满意
sample_comments.text: 环境优美 很适合逃离城市的时候在这里放松 老板人很nice
sample_comments.room_type: Double Room with Courtyard View-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

sample_comments.title: Unique service .
sample_comments.text: The guy in the reception is so helpful. He literally helped me with everything I needed without any hesitation. The breakfast is very good and has options, the location is very beautiful and the option to take a motorbike all the time free of charge makes a difference!
sample_comments.room_type: Fully View Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

sample_comments.title: Great stay
sample_comments.text: The owner was very friendly and accommodated all our requirements.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

sample_comments.title: Best stay
sample_comments.text: One of the best stay I have ever had so far. The setting was tranquil, and the view was breathtaking. It is nearby a few tourist attractions and only a 10-minute drive from the city center. The owner was hospitable and his service was exceptional, making the resort stand out. When we returned back to the resort, he always greeted us with drinks and chatted with us. Thank you, Secret Courtyard Resort for making my stay a memorable one.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

sample_comments.title: best!!
sample_comments.text: I loved!!
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Double Room

sample_comments.title: Great hotel
sample_comments.text: The host was very gentil and welcoming! The room is big, confortable beds, good shower, good balcony... And the location is also great! In a vila with restaurants around.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Great service and very good location!

sample_comments.title: Wonderful place away from the hustle of the city
sample_comments.positives: The villa is located in a secluded area, far from the hustle of the city, but still easy to reach by Didi or scooter, which are offered to guest to be used for free during the stay. Xiaming, the owner of the place, is a very nice person, very helpful and kind. He carried both our really heavy bags up the stairs to our room on the 2nd floor. He gave us complimentary bottles of water, mandarines and napkins everytime we left the villa for a tour and when we did the checkout. The breakfast was also nice, being able to choose between Asia and European version. The room was nice and cosy. Though there is no central heating in the room, the air conditioning and the electric heated top mattress were more than enough.
sample_comments.negatives: N/A

sample_comments.title: This is my second time and if I come back to Guilin I'll come back again to the same place.
sample_comments.positives: The room was well prepared before our arrival. It was cold and the room and prepared to keep us warm even before our arrival. Beds had heating pads and their room for families with kids was amazing. Enough toys and things to keep a 4 year old busy throughout. Comfortable bunk bed with double bed on the lower deck and single on the upper deck. On the whole nothing to complain.
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: the location of thr hotel is in a quiet village, perfect if you want to enjoy nature and a peaceful time in Guilin. The rooms are great, the staff helped us with absolutely everything, breakfast was tasty and you can even use their motorbikes for free... we came back again and will do it next year!

sample_comments.title: We had a wonderful stay at this villa in Guilin. The surroundings are peaceful and quiet, which made it the perfect plac
sample_comments.positives: The location is slightly away from the main city, which we actually appreciated, as it gave us more tranquility while still being accessible by car or taxi. It's also convenient to reach several tourist attractions in the area. Overall, this was a great stay and we would happily come back!

sample_comments.title: Great view and value
sample_comments.positives:
Great host. Apartment was big and very very clean. Good breakfast as well.
Excursions from the hotel were on the pricey side, but found them totally worth it.
Host very helpful and friendly, free laundry, restaurants around.
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing

sample_comments.title: Ver nice and helpful staff.
sample_comments.positives: The hotel is in a very charming villa. The room was very clean and comfortable. We booked a room which had a couples massage included, which was very nice. Mr. Xiaoming was extremely helpful with everything we needed. It was my wife's birthday so he also helped me prepare something special for her.
sample_comments.negatives: The hotel is not very close to the city center and the tourists attractions. But there was the possibility to get electric bikes from the hotel for free which was very nice and helpful. Besides, Mr. Xiaoming also helps plan and book the visit to any tourist attraction.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: The staff are so friendly and let you feel home ,welcome you with water, juice and watermelon even in the middle of the night.also the guide is so nice and offer very good insights and unforgettable moments ,i highly recommend this hotel ,also u get free scooter ,free laundry

sample_comments.title: I highly recommend this place, especially for families!
sample_comments.positives: Convenient location, big villa, kind staff, such a great place to stay for family!

sample_comments.title: highly recommended especially of short on time as the location is within walking and biking distance
sample_comments.positives: excellent location and view was wonderful, especially from terrace bath . staff were above and beyond expectations

sample_comments.title: A warm, welcoming, and unforgettable stay with the best host we've ever had --- truly felt like home.
sample_comments.positives: The host was incredibly friendly, professional, and generous. He offered free watermelon every evening, provided complimentary e-bikes, free laundry service, and a delicious free breakfast. He also responded quickly to my visa document requests over email. Overall, the best and most thoughtful host I've ever stayed with!
sample_comments.negatives: Honestly, there was nothing I didn't like. Everything was well taken care of, and the host went above and beyond. It felt like staying with a friend rather than just booking a place.

sample_comments.title: Must come back
sample_comments.positives: Beautiful area, and far from city center. Comfortable clean rooms with amenities and nice view. Breakfast was so good and freshly prepared. They provide electric bike and bicycles for guests to use, free of charge. Incredibly attentive and cooperative host, thank you Mr. Xiao. He gifted us watermelon and cookies before taking off to our next stop.

sample_comments.title: We love the location, staff and would recommend this place.
sample_comments.positives: Service was amazing. From picking us up at the train station to arranging our tours, service was flawless. We had 8 people in our group, aged from 16 to 52. Everyone loved the use of the scooters, the location, and the kids especially enjoyed the plum juice. Just wished we had a couple more days there. Will definitely stay here again if we take another trip to Guilin.
sample_comments.negatives: When we went, it was especially hot. The air conditioning could have been a bit colder. But once it got later into the evening, it was cool.

sample_comments.title: A fun experience in an unusual property :))
sample_comments.positives: The neighborhood is very cute and the offer of a free electric bike to travel around was very cool indeed.
sample_comments.negatives: Not sure that it felt like a problem but a slight lack of general tidiness in the property ... Actually all part of a laid-back style

sample_comments.title: Charming Inn in a quiet neighborhood
sample_comments.positives: This was a charming family run (I think?) in on a quiet little island off the main road in Northern Guilin. Everything was clean and comfortable and the owners made a great breakfast for everyone - choice of "Western" or "Chinese". They also offered services like free use of motor scooters (super fun!) and free laundry. You had the sense you were in a quiet little neighborhood with kids playing games outside and little restaurants a short walk away. All delightful.
sample_comments.negatives: Not that I "didn't like" or expected, but the rooms themselves aren't luxury or brand new, but are certainly very clean, have everything you need and have lovely touches like a Chinese tea service ready for you in a window seat.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Everything is great! The place is very well managed. I and my two college student childen loved our two-day stay. The interior design and the surrounding areas are beautiful. The host is very friendly, thoughtful and knowledgeable. He gave us many travel tips. We loved riding the scooters in the neighborhood. sincerely recommend it.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives:
Staff was extremely attentive. The place was clean and charming with nice views to nearby mountains. 
We were able to use electric scooters from hotel. The village had several restaurants, a couple street food vendors and a couple small shops. Nearby hiking trail over the mountain was also a nice one.
sample_comments.negatives: Small mosquitos caused a bit itching to one of our group apparently due allergy. There were mosquito repellant available though, if we had just remembered to use it.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives:
Amazing location, staff were so kind and welcoming. So helpful with advice, always ready with tea/coffee and orange juice whenever we appeared. 

Let us check in early no problems. The room is comfortable, really nice view of the surrounding karsts. 

The village the hotel is set in is really scenic and quaint. And easy to travel to Guilin from. 

Could bro recommend this wonderful hotel more.
sample_comments.negatives: Everything was perfect.

sample_comments.title: Lovely stay
sample_comments.positives: Quiet location set on a small island. Lovely staff who are eager to help. They had many tours available for us to choose from. Laid back atmosphere, very relaxing. The breakfast is top notch.

sample_comments.title: Would highly recommend for all travelers!
sample_comments.positives: Staying at this hotel was an incredible experience. We stayed for 4 nights and would highly recommend it for all travelers, whether Chinese nationals or foreigners. The host was super welcoming and helpful, giving us advice and answering any questions we had. He was also easily accessible. The rooms themselves were also clean and it was easy to feel right at home. Overall highly recommend for all travelers!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Xiao Ming made the experience an excellent one. He looked after us very well. We couldn't decide whether we should do the 4 hour Li River cruise but he suggested a different tour between Guilin and Yangshuo. We visited an ancient town, went on a bamboo boat up the river and stopped for lunch. The breakfast was a choice between Guilin rice noodles and toast. The villa was great and the electric ma Jong table and added bonus. It was cold because we came in Dec but each room had a heat pump so we were cosy
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing

sample_comments.title: Amazing vacation assisted by great host.
sample_comments.positives: Amazing stay, the host is extremely nice and helped throughout the way setting up arrival. Also helped with the itinerary and tour guide for an amazing trip.
sample_comments.negatives: Toilets could have stronger flushing but no issues overall.

sample_comments.title: Enjoyed my stay and impressed by the hospitality
sample_comments.positives: The breakfast is OK. The location is in a cute resort village if the serene and quietness is what you like. There is a 3 miles beautiful board walk behind the resort property where you can walk, jog, or bike. The famous LuDi cave is only 15 mins walk away via the board walk.

sample_comments.title: Nice place to stay.
sample_comments.positives: Breakfast was prepared fresh and tasted good. Personal service was excellent. The whole staff was friendly. The room was nice and clean. The location is a short walk from Reed Flute Cave which is worth the visit.

sample_comments.title: We really enjoyed our stay at Secret Courtyard Hotel. The view was amazing and the housekeeper was so nice and courteous
sample_comments.positives:
- the room had a beautiful view and was very thoughtful decorated 
- the housekeeper was very friendly and prepared everything for us
- you can get everything you need there, from laundry to massage to getting a trip organized for you.

sample_comments.title: Wonderful place to spend a couple of nights
sample_comments.positives: Really nice and helpful staff! The old grandma took good care of us, providing tea and washing our clothes and even gave is a nice handcrafted departure gift. The location is central for the major attractions like Yangshuo in the South and the Longji rice terraces in the north

sample_comments.title: A peaceful adventure
sample_comments.positives: The location is perfect. The owner and staff are super helpful and welcoming. The day trips were incredible.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: This little village inn gets top marks for all the thoughtful little things that its owners have considered to make their guests' stay as comfortable as possible. I got use of their electric scooter to hit the sights, the room was super clean with everything you need, breakfast was delicious and we even got a goodie bag to take with us on our journey, filled with fruits and little bits of snacks. I would never have expected it from a setup like this, and at this price point. Well done!
sample_comments.negatives: The outside could do with a bit of upkeeping.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Convenient location , very cozy

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: This is definitely the place you would like to stay if you woukd like to relax. There is a cycling and joghing track within walking distance from the hotel. The owner is very welcoming, helpful and go extra miles to make our visit enjoyable. I'm really happy with my stay and would like to go back again.
sample_comments.negatives: None

sample_comments.title: If you're looking for a hotel with local charm, this is it
sample_comments.positives: It was not the standard five star hotel that I would normally stay at, but the place has a lot of unique charm And the guy who runs it is five star. He took care of all of our needs and helped us out as we scrambled for the train station. Not super fancy, but I would stay there again. If you're looking for a more localized, charming feel, I would give it a try

sample_comments.title: Remarkable place
sample_comments.positives:
Secret Courtyard Resort Hotel in Guilin, China, is a hidden gem that offers guests a unique and memorable experience. Nestled along the Peach Flower River, this hotel is praised for its serene ambiance and beautiful local architectural elements.

The strong points of this hotel are cleanliness, service, and value, making it one of the top choices in Guilin 

The owner helpfulness' in arranging customized travel routes and sightseeing plans was just perfect. Besides, the kindness of our guide and driver, Qin was also remarkable, adding a personal touch to the guests' experiences and ensuring our comfort and convenience during our stay.

With its excellent location, the Secret Courtyard Resort Hotel serves as a peaceful retreat while still providing easy access to Guilin's famous attractions, such as the Reed Flute Cave and the Li River. 

Whether it's the thoughtful amenities, the attentive service, or the charming setting, this hotel is a wonderful choice for anyone looking to explore the natural beauty and culture of Guilin.
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing to comment

sample_comments.title: Gorgeous Guilin
sample_comments.positives: I like the Panda stuff toys on the bed, little touch that made it feels like home. Room is well ventilated with Chinese style tea tatami setting. Xiaomin is a good host, helpful. Qin our guide, native who speaks English made the trip not so lost in translation for my hubby who doesn't speak Chinese. The local rice noodles served at breakfast was we had it everyday.
sample_comments.negatives: Bathroom wasn't properly clean, some hair from previous guest that had been collected but left in the corner of the tile

sample_comments.title: Best homestay in Guilin
sample_comments.positives: Amazing homestay in a beautiful and quiet village 10 minutes away from Guilin. Room was nicely decorated with little cute details and the bed was super comfy. The landlord went above and beyond to make our stay perfect helping us with everything we needed. Must try the rice noodles for breakfast, delicious! Will definitely come back
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing

sample_comments.title: Excellent hospitality, great location, cozy rooms
sample_comments.positives: Everyone is incredibly warm, welcoming, and friendly. The staff went above and beyond to ensure our stay was comfortable. The rooms were clean and cozy and the breakfast was delicious. We loved our stay here and highly recommend it for anyone wishing to explore the beautiful city of Guilin!

sample_comments.title: Excellent hospitality and a cozy location
sample_comments.positives:
The location of this hotel is well situated on the outskirts of Guilin city. It has several attractions within a walkable distance, such as Reed Flute Cave, but it is also a drivable within an hour and a half to major tourist sites like Longji rice terraces to the north and Yangshou county to the south. It is also within a cozy village, and we explored the local restaurants in the first day.

The friendly owner of the establishment went above and beyond in service, responded through text quickly to arrange private tours to the places we wanted to go. We were picked up from the train station when we arrived at Guilin and transported back at the end of the trip. Breakfast options range from homemade local guilin rice noodles with fruit to a more western style option if preferred. Bed was comfortable with working wifi and AC.

I was expecially impressed by the small things, how when we came back from a long day of touring the owner would always have fresh fruit waiting for us, how the towels and complimentary water would be refilled and waiting for us on our return, and how we were given a bag with snacks and other items for our trip home. 

If you are looking for a relaxed, local experience with good service that serves as a base to set off to see all Guilin has to offer, then I can't recommend this place enough.

sample_comments.title: Excellent stay at this boutique hotel and very kind staff.
sample_comments.positives: Host, breakfast, staff, clean , it was all great !!!
sample_comments.negatives: Everything was great

sample_comments.title: A relaxing and pleasant stay.
sample_comments.positives: The host was very friendly and care taking. Love the location as it has a jogging track near by. Breakfast was good. The portion was good size.
sample_comments.negatives: The aircon in the room is a bit noisy when turn on.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: This place was great! Perfect for a trip to Guilin, out of the crowded spots so it's super peaceful. The owner is really amazing and makes this spot perfect. We hope to be back.

sample_comments.title: A perfect boutuque hotel, not luxury but quite peaceful comfortable hotel
sample_comments.positives:
Friendly and very helpful of the owner, comfortable location with facilities of tandem bike, that made us travel around seeing a beautiful scenary.
The owner also help us arrange our tours plus help us bought the train tickets left Guilin.

sample_comments.title: Quiet stay in a peaceful and green environment. The host went out of his way to help each guest, which will make up for
sample_comments.positives: Location, service, breakfast.
sample_comments.negatives: Room cleaning could've been better.

sample_comments.title: We had a great time at this hotel! It was a quiet place where we could recharge from the day's adventures, and the owner
sample_comments.positives: The property is well taken care of and a tasteful blend of rustic decor and modern amenities. It is also tucked away on a quiet side of the city. The owner is eager to help plan itineraries for Guilin's many attractions, and the hotel's Guilin Rice Noodles easily competes with the best in the city.
sample_comments.negatives: The property is a little hard to get to via public transportation, but taxis are cheap and plentiful.

sample_comments.title: Within walking distance to Reed Flute Cave
sample_comments.positives: I stayed three nights at the hotel. It's locally owned and situated inside a modern village. The owner was friendly and helpful. He provided information about Guilin and helped my father and me booked a tour to Longji rice terraces. The hotel is approximately 30 minutes walk to Reed Flute Cave. The cave opens 8 AM. My father and I went to the cave the day we checked out. I highly recommend going in the morning because there's no crowd.
sample_comments.negatives: The shower was a bit dark and would be nice to have a light installed.

secondary.description_full:
Positioned along Taohua River, Secret Courtyard Resort Hotel boasts a Chinese-style courtyard and is located in Lujia Village, just 2 km from downtown Guilin. Surrounded by mountains and waters, the property offers quiet accommodation and peaceful ambience where you may easily relax.

Reed Flute Cave lays 5 minutes' drive away. It takes 15 minutes by car to Li River, Taohua River, and Two Rivers and Four Lakes, and 15 minutes by car to downtown Guilin. Guilin Railway Station can be reached in 20 minutes' car ride. It is a 40-minute drive to Liangjiang International Airport. Xianggong Mountain is 50 km away. Yangshuo West Street and Yulong River are 60 kilometers.

Featuring mountain or river views, all air-conditioned rooms are fitted with an LCD TV, quality bed linen and wood furniture. Soundproofing rooms here will also offer a balcony or bay windows. In the private bathroom, you may find a hairdryer, slippers, a shaver and branded free toiletries.

A wide range of convenience facilities or service are offered, including English travel assistance service, beauty spa centre, a bar with music and a book bar. You may rent a bike to explore the area, or the staff can help design personalised travel routes. Free parking is available.

The restaurant with floor-to-ceiling windows offers local specialties while the lobby bar serves free tea.

faq.question: Secret Courtyard Resort Hotel có dịch vụ spa không?
faq.answer: Kỳ lưu trú của quý khách tại Secret Courtyard Resort Hotel sẽ đáng nhớ hơn khi tự thưởng cho mình trải nghiệm các dịch vụ spa tại cơ sở lưu trú và có cho mình một khoảng thời gian thư giãn tuyệt vời.

faq.question: Có các hoạt động thể thao dưới nước nào tại Secret Courtyard Resort Hotel?
faq.answer: Secret Courtyard Resort Hotel có các hoạt động thể thao dưới nước như câu cá và xuồng dành cho những ai yêu thích các môn thể thao dưới nước.

faq.question: Secret Courtyard Resort Hotel có trung tâm thể thao không?
faq.answer: Có! Secret Courtyard Resort Hotel cung cấp phòng tập tọa lạc trong khuôn viên, đáp ứng nhu cầu tập luyện thể thao giữ dáng của quý khách trong suốt kỳ nghỉ. Để biết thêm chi tiết, vui lòng liên hệ với cơ sở lưu trú.

faq.answer: Tại Secret Courtyard Resort Hotel, khách có thể yêu cầu lựa chọn nhận phòng và trả phòng không tiếp xúc để thuận tiện và an toàn.

faq.question: Có các công viên nào gần Secret Courtyard Resort Hotel?

faq.question: Chính sách về giường ngủ cho trẻ em tại Secret Courtyard Resort Hotel

faq.question: Giá phòng trung bình của Secret Courtyard Resort Hotel trong những tháng qua

embedding_text:
Secret Courtyard Resort Hotel - khách sạn 4.0 sao tại Quế Lâm.
Địa chỉ: No.32 Taohua Road,Lujiacun Village, Reed Flute Cave, Quế Lâm, Trung Quốc.
Positioned along Taohua River, Secret Courtyard Resort Hotel boasts a Chinese-style courtyard and is located in Lujia Village, just 2 km from downtown Guilin. Surrounded by mountains and waters, the property offers quiet accommodation and peaceful ambience where you may easily relax.

Reed Flute Cave lays 5 minutes' drive away. It takes 15 minutes by car to Li River, Taohua River, and Two Rivers and Four Lakes, and 15 minutes by car to downtown Guilin. Guilin Railway Station can be reached in 20 minutes' car ride. It is a 40-minute drive to Liangjiang International Airport. Xianggong Mountain is 50 km away. Yangshuo West Street and Yulong River are 60 kilometers.

Featuring mountain or river views, all air-conditioned rooms are fitted with an LCD TV, quality bed linen and wood furniture. Soundproofing rooms here will also offer a balcony or bay windows. In the private bathroom, you may find a hairdryer, slippers, a shaver and branded free toiletries.

A wide range of convenience facilities or service are offered, including English travel assistance service, beauty spa centre, a bar with music and a book bar. You may rent a bike to explore the area, or the staff can help design personalised travel routes. Free parking is available.

The restaurant with floor-to-ceiling windows offers local specialties while the lobby bar serves free tea.
Tiện ích: Bi-a, Bãi chơi bowling, Bãi đỗ xe [gần bên], Bãi đỗ xe [miễn phí], Bãi đỗ xe có nhân viên, Bình chữa cháy, Bóng bàn, Băng niêm phong phòng dành cho khách sau khi vệ sinh, Bơi xuồng, Bảo vệ [24 giờ], Bồn ngâm chân, Bữa sáng trong phòng, Bữa ăn cho trẻ, CCTV bên ngoài chỗ nghỉ, CCTV trong khu vực chung, Chuyến du lịch, Cách bày bàn ăn an toàn, Câu cá, Có thể yêu cầu không khử trùng phòng, Cưỡi ngựa, Cửa hàng tạp hóa, Dịch vụ Internet, Dịch vụ bán thức ăn sáng mang về, Dịch vụ giặt là, Dịch vụ phòng, Dịch vụ thanh toán không sử dụng tiền mặt, Dịch vụ đưa đón, Dịch vụ ủi đồ, Dọn phòng hằng ngày, Giao hàng tạp hóa.
Điểm đánh giá 9.3/10 dựa trên 757 đánh giá.
Khách hay nhắc đến: Dịch vụ, Địa điểm, Bữa sáng, Chủ nhà, Độ thoải mái của phòng, Độ sạch sẽ, Hướng nhìn từ phòng, Thiên nhiên.
Các loại phòng: Fully View Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay; Biệt Thự 2 Phòng Ngủ (Two-Bedroom Villa); Panorama Queen Room; Panorama Queen Room; Panorama Queen Room; Panorama Queen Room; Courtyard Queen Room (Mixed gender); Deluxe Twin Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay.
